name: SCAR-20 | 暗夜活死鸡
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been spray-painted with a pattern depicting chickens on a battlefield. A chicken rides a shark into battle...
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器采用喷涂的方式，描绘了小鸡在战地的图案。 小鸡乘着鲨鱼去战斗……
